briefing: Markets are modestly risk-on today with NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P 500 +0.9%. We deployed a portion of idle cash into ACMR and UCTT, the two top-scoring candidates showing all four confirmation signals (MACD crossover, bullish RSI, price above SMA-20, volume surge), while holding the rest of the portfolio steady.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum confirmation means checking that multiple independent indicators — like MACD, RSI, price trend, and trading volume — all point the same bullish direction before buying, rather than relying on just one signal. This reduces the chance of chasing a false or short-lived move.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「動能確認」是指在買入前，同時檢查多個獨立指標（例如MACD、RSI、價格趨勢及成交量）是否一致指向看漲方向，而不是單靠一個訊號做決定。這樣可以減少追入假訊號或短暫波動的風險。

market_education.summary_en: Broad market gains today reflect continued risk appetite across tech and semiconductor-adjacent names, with NASDAQ outperforming the S&P 500. Several stocks in the screened universe showed synchronized bullish momentum signals (MACD crossovers, rising volume), suggesting sector-wide institutional buying rather than isolated moves. No single dominant catalyst was identified in today's data, consistent with a steady grind-higher risk-on session rather than a news-driven spike.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大市延續風險偏好情緒，納指升1.3%，標普500升0.9%，升幅由科技及半導體相關股份帶動。篩選名單中多隻股票同時出現MACD黃金交叉及成交量放大等看漲訊號，反映機構資金正全面流入相關板塊，而非個別股份的偶發波動。今日並無特別重大新聞觸發，屬於穩步向好的風險偏好交易日。

trades.reasoning: Full signal confirmation (RSI 68.9, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, volume surge) on a risk-on day.
Identical full multi-signal confirmation to ACMR with strong volume surge, indicating institutional participation.
